title: We'd love to
description: Have a question, found a bug, or want to suggest something? Open an issue on GitHub or send us an email — the maintainers read everything.

channels.title: Talk to the maintainers
channels.description: These are the real ways to reach the people behind TaskFlow.

github.title: GitHub Issues
github.description: The fastest path for bug reports and feature ideas — public and trackable.

email.title: Email
email.description: For anything not appropriate for a public issue.

form.title: Or drop us a note
form.demoNote: Heads up — this form is a UI demo until SMTP is wired up. For a real response, please use one of the channels on the left.
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind…

toast.description: Thanks {{name}} — for a real reply please open a GitHub issue or email us.
